title: Elders' Council
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the Elders' Council of the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]]|other groups called the [[Elders (disambiguation)]]|linebreak=1}}
The '''Elders' Council''' was one of two political councils of the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]]. It was endowed with both judicial and legislative powers. The Council was occupied by [[Ssi-ruu#Blue|blue Ssi-ruu]].

Together with the [[Conclave]], the Council elected the [[shreeftut]]. The Council and the Conclave were bitter rivals over which was to be the dominant power in the Imperium, and often it was only the shreeftut's influence that prevented civil war.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
